profile.name: Gajanan
profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
profile.bio: Senior Full-Stack Engineer specializing in scalable web architectures and modern user experiences. I excel at leading teams through complex technical transitions and delivering high-performance, production-ready software using Next.js and TypeScript.

projects.title: SentinelIQ Insider Threat Platform
projects.description: An AI-driven behavioral analytics platform detecting privileged access misuse and insider threats. Integrates LSTM-based UEBA, GNN collusion mapping, SHAP-based explainable AI, and Post-Quantum Cryptography simulations.

projects.title: TrustStream Decentralized Layer
projects.description: Architectural scaffold for a decentralized data integrity layer, featuring a Java-based blockchain orchestrator, Python data engine, Solidity smart contracts, and a Next.js monitoring dashboard.

projects.title: Proton Anomaly Dashboard
projects.description: A premium, glassmorphism-styled web dashboard enabling real-time interaction with a privacy-preserving behavioral anomaly detection API, complete with sequential history visualization.

achievements: Leading the architecture and implementation of scalable, high-fidelity agentic tools within advanced AI contexts.
Spearheaded multiple high-impact projects including SentinelIQ and TrustStream from concept to production.
Collaborated with cross-functional engineers to deploy robust, production-ready systems.
Architected modern end-to-end web architectures and optimized CI/CD pipelines for optimal deployment velocity.
Mentored a team of 4 engineers while transitioning monolithic legacy setups into modern headless microservices.
Delivered high-performance dynamic user experiences using Next.js, TypeScript, and Prisma.
